chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 541 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.2362/2021 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 07-10-2021 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition has been filed challenging the transfer and posting by the respondents. The same is a matter of terms and conditions and in that case the remedy is before the Service Tribunal. Accordingly, the petition being not maintainable is dismissed with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
